title: More Fuel
description: Fully configure what you can use as fuel.
body:
# More Fuel Fully configure what you can use as fuel!
Comes pre-configured with what I think should be used as fuel.
**This project has been merged into [Vanilla Tweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-tweaker)**
### Config ***config change requires restart*** **Add / Replace**
• namespace:path seconds
• ex: "minecraft:magma_block 60" **Remove**
• -namespace:path
• ex: "-minecraft:coal" [Discord](https://discord.gg/rWkXF7pbmG)
